**Frontier‐orbital gap of furan** — DFT, tier standard (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, density fitting via RIJK) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. SCF converged in 9 cycles; no warnings reported.

HOMO = −6.3597638 eV, LUMO = −0.1024036 eV → gap = 6.2573602 eV

Command run:  
`/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier --method dft --charge 0 --mult 1 --functional B3LYP --basis def2-TZVP --tier standard /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/furan/furan.xyz --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmp7jmu599j/live.json`
